subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! When thou gazest with discernment, every bounty is divinely bestowed, not through the endeavors and strivings of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان چون بدقت نظر کنی هر موهبتی خداداد است نه بسعی و کوشش عالم
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @thankfulness; gratitude, @unity; oneness of humanity
